title: Ability to send outbound emails from a shared outlook mailbox

posts.author: Bperez1231 (Brian Martinez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday.com team.

Love the platform, but it would be truly transformative if a team was able to send out emails from a board using a shared email address.

We have automated processes where we would love to have an email got out once a certain process stage is reached. However, it needs to come from a shared outlook email vs the individual user’s email.

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Brian,

You may want to look at the Advanced Formula Booster which offers the ability to send transaction emails through Mailgun and SendPulse (both of which have a free plan, particularly generous when it comes to SendPulse).

For more on this, see How to Send Transactional Emails.

posts.author: matts (Matt S)
posts.cookedHtml:
Seconded, Brian. This would be nice.

I’m currently trying to switch out an individual email account for a shared mailbox to send emails with the outlook.com integration, so I will be sure to share my feedback with their team as well.

posts.author: osamahaskari (Osamah Askari)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Bperez1231 Hey I’ve actually been commenting on all problem similar to yours where we solved this problem with a Monday App to overcome this, its called SharedMailer and it does exactly what you and I struggled with.

dashboard_sharedmailer3227×1842 136 KB

its in Early Access right now so I wont show up in marketplace until I complete all the requirement to get app approved like the documentation and everything. But its in Early Access and if you want Early Access you can either go to sharedmailer.osamahaskari.com or email me at hello@osamahaskari.com and we can provide you better than Free access for you to use. You’ll find the tutorial and exactly what it does on its website.

posts.cookedHtml:
